# TradeHQ

> TradeHQ is a free, no-signup paper-trading simulator for stocks, crypto, ETFs, forex, and commodities. Beginners get $100,000 in virtual cash, an AI mentor, live-style charts, and a public leaderboard to practice trading without risking real money.

TradeHQ is an educational simulator (not a brokerage). All prices are simulated for practice. Content is written and maintained by Anuga Weerasinghe. TradeHQ does not provide financial advice.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/): What TradeHQ is, how the free simulator works, key features.
- [Trade](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/trade): Live-style trading terminal with 150+ practice assets.
- [Markets](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/markets): Full asset universe — stocks, crypto, ETFs, forex, commodities.
- [Portfolio](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/portfolio): Virtual portfolio, P&L, Sharpe ratio, drawdown analytics.
- [Leaderboard](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/leaderboard): Public ranking of virtual traders by return.
- [AI Mentor](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/ai-mentor): AI-powered trading coach for beginners.
- [About](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/about): Mission, creator, transparency.
- [Contact](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/contact): How to reach the TradeHQ team.

## Learn (courses & guides)

- [Learn hub](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/learn): Free structured trading courses for beginners.
- [Trading Guide 2026](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/learn-trading-guide): Comprehensive beginner-to-intermediate trading guide.
- [Roadmap](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/roadmap): Upcoming TradeHQ features and improvements.

## Wiki (defined terms)

- [Trading Wiki](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/wiki/short-squeeze): Plain-English definitions of 50+ trading concepts (short squeeze, RSI, MACD, order block, Fibonacci retracement, etc.).

- [All comparisons](https://tradinghq.lovable.app/compare)
